message:
test(core): add registry integrity tests for prompt validation

Add comprehensive test suite to validate the prompts registry in
@jeffreysprompts/core package:

- Verify registry exports a non-empty array of prompts
- Ensure all prompt IDs are unique (no duplicates)
- Validate each prompt conforms to PromptSchema using Zod
- Check that all prompts have meaningful content (>10 characters)

These tests run during CI to catch issues like:
- Malformed prompt definitions that don't match the schema
- Accidentally duplicated prompt IDs when adding new prompts
- Empty or placeholder content that slipped through review

Location: packages/core/__tests__/prompts/registry-integrity.test.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
